{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Flight Operations Auditor",
  "description": "Green Africa Airways Limited is a value airline based in Lagos, Nigeria. We are a new carrier that offers safe, reliable and affordable air travel to a much broader group of customers. This positions us as a significant contributor to the economic development of Nigeria and the African continent.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Flight Operations Auditor

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full Time

Job Summary


	Ensure communication and coordination with operational gLeads in the management of operational risks
	Implement the requirements of Civil Aviation Regulations and all associated airworthiness requirements in flight operations
	identified through audits conducted on the organization are corrected within the stipulated time
	Advising flight operations department on the best ways to fulfill the requirements of the Authority and industry best practice
	Communicate regularly with operational gLeads within the organization, subcontracted organization and suppliers on the requirements and implementation of the quality management system and safety management system desired goals
	Monitor flight operations organization&rsquo;s compliance with Civil Aviation Regulations
	Implement Quality Audit Program to meet company goals and regulatory authority requirements
	Administer the program and establishing a follow up system for discrepancies observed during audit activities
	Collect and analyze operational flight data and reports to identify needed improvement in training, IOCC and crew performance
	Monitor dispatch, flight crew and cabin crew for currency of medicals, licenses, competency and simulator training currency
	Monitor flight &amp; duty periods for flight dispatchers, flight crew and cabin crew to check to ensure crew operate within regulatory limits and manage fatigue risk
	Monitor flight operations sub-contractors and suppliers for performance in accordance with Green Africa standards


Qualifications


	Must be a holder of a Diploma or Degree in Aerospace or Aeronautical Engineering; or must have held a Cabin Crew license or must have held a Flight Dispatcher license or must have held a Commercial Pilot License
	Must be conversant with Nigeria Civil Aviation Authority Requirement and organizational requirements and procedures
	Must have worked in a commercial or private airline for at least 3 years
	Must hold an Auditor qualification.


Must have skills:


	Auditing
	Research
	Organization
	Communication
	Quality management
	Record management

Flight Operations Auditor Job at Green Africa Airways Limited




        
    

        
        Green Africa Airways Limited is a value airline based in Lagos, Nigeria. We are a new carrier that offers safe, reliable and affordable air travel to a much broader group of customers. This positions us as a significant contributor to the economic development of Nigeria and the African continent.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Flight Operations Auditor

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full Time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Ensure communication and coordination with operational gLeads in the management of operational risks
	Implement the requirements of Civil Aviation Regulations and all associated airworthiness requirements in flight operations
	identified through audits conducted on the organization are corrected within the stipulated time
	Advising flight operations department on the best ways to fulfill the requirements of the Authority and industry best practice
	Communicate regularly with operational gLeads within the organization, subcontracted organization and suppliers on the requirements and implementation of the quality management system and safety management system desired goals
	Monitor flight operations organization’s compliance with Civil Aviation Regulations
	Implement Quality Audit Program to meet company goals and regulatory authority requirements
	Administer the program and establishing a follow up system for discrepancies observed during audit activities
	Collect and analyze operational flight data and reports to identify needed improvement in training, IOCC and crew performance
	Monitor dispatch, flight crew and cabin crew for currency of medicals, licenses, competency and simulator training currency
	Monitor flight & duty periods for flight dispatchers, flight crew and cabin crew to check to ensure crew operate within regulatory limits and manage fatigue risk
	Monitor flight operations sub-contractors and suppliers for performance in accordance with Green Africa standards


Qualifications


	Must be a holder of a Diploma or Degree in Aerospace or Aeronautical Engineering; or must have held a Cabin Crew license or must have held a Flight Dispatcher license or must have held a Commercial Pilot License
	Must be conversant with Nigeria Civil Aviation Authority Requirement and organizational requirements and procedures
	Must have worked in a commercial or private airline for at least 3 years
	Must hold an Auditor qualification.


Must have skills:


	Auditing
	Research
	Organization
	Communication
	Quality management
	Record management
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Electrical Engineer",
  "description": "Adkan Service Nigeria Limited is a wholly indigenous construction company with a bias of undertaking construction projects essentially within the country. The reason for this nationalistic and patriotic bent is to join hands with others of like minds in other specialised fields in making Nigeria not only the pride of other nations but a reference point in Architectural designs and brilliantly executed construction projects. In furtherance of this mission statement, it is worth stating that all our completed projects can stand the test of time and can also compete favourably with similar projects elsewhere in the world.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements
Educational Background:


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree (B.Eng/B.Tech) in Electrical or Electronics Engineering from a recognized institution.
	Master&rsquo;s degree is an added advantage.


Certifications:


	COREN (Council for the Regulation of Engineering in Nigeria) certification is required.
	Membership with NSE (Nigerian Society of Engineers) is an added advantage.
	HSE (Health, Safety, and Environment) certification is an added advantage.


Experience:


	Must have 3&ndash;5 years of relevant experience in electrical design, installation, and maintenance (preferably within the construction, real estate, or manufacturing sectors).


Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Strong knowledge of electrical systems, power distribution, and control systems.
	Proficiency in AutoCAD, Revit MEP, or other relevant electrical design software.
	Ability to read and interpret technical drawings and schematics.
	Strong problem-solving and project management skills.
	Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.
	Ability to work under pressure and in fast-paced environments


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;adkangroupjobs@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the mail.",

Electrical Engineer Job at Adkan Group and Services Limited




        
    

        
        Adkan Service Nigeria Limited is a wholly indigenous construction company with a bias of undertaking construction projects essentially within the country. The reason for this nationalistic and patriotic bent is to join hands with others of like minds in other specialised fields in making Nigeria not only the pride of other nations but a reference point in Architectural designs and brilliantly executed construction projects. In furtherance of this mission statement, it is worth stating that all our completed projects can stand the test of time and can also compete favourably with similar projects elsewhere in the world.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Engineer
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements
Educational Background:


	Bachelor’s degree (B.Eng/B.Tech) in Electrical or Electronics Engineering from a recognized institution.
	Master’s degree is an added advantage.


Certifications:


	COREN (Council for the Regulation of Engineering in Nigeria) certification is required.
	Membership with NSE (Nigerian Society of Engineers) is an added advantage.
	HSE (Health, Safety, and Environment) certification is an added advantage.


Experience:


	Must have 3–5 years of relevant experience in electrical design, installation, and maintenance (preferably within the construction, real estate, or manufacturing sectors).


Skills & Competencies:


	Strong knowledge of electrical systems, power distribution, and control systems.
	Proficiency in AutoCAD, Revit MEP, or other relevant electrical design software.
	Ability to read and interpret technical drawings and schematics.
	Strong problem-solving and project management skills.
	Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.
	Ability to work under pressure and in fast-paced environments


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Marketing Manager Job at Adkan Group and Services Limited

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Manager

About Us


	Adkan Services Nigeria Limited is a reputable indigenous construction and real estate company with decades of experience delivering high-quality residential and commercial projects across Nigeria.

	Develop and manage marketing campaigns, proposals, and presentations

	Organize marketing activities, property exhibitions, and promotional events

title: Job Openings at Air Peace Limited
content:
At Air Peace Limited, we continuously strive for excellence in all we do. Through our people we are able to attain higher heights because their unique strengths and experiences help us turn challenges into opportunities. We employ the best talent and provide a great opportunity and environment for them to display their best skills in a service driven environment.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Senior Technical Procurement Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Job Type: Full-time

Role Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The purpose of this job description is to define the strategic and operational requirements for a Senior Technical Procurement Officer.
	This role is responsible for leading the end-to-end strategic sourcing and acquisition of aircraft components, ground support equipment, and specialized technical services.
	This role ensures the seamless availability of critical assets while maintaining strict compliance with global aviation safety standards (FAA/EASA) and optimizing supply chain costs to support operational readiness and fleet reliability.


Key Responsibilities


	Reviews present policies and procedures regarding purchasing and develops a system and technique of economical purchasing, and discusses with the supervisor.
	Ensures that purchase orders are placed per existing company policy and procedures.
	Designs and administers saving programs and procedures in coordination with the concerned sections.
	Maintains updated price catalogues under his/her responsibility. Assures five Rights prior to issuance of purchase orders.
	Keeps records of vendors' performance & provides reports when required. Prepares and reviews the monthly activities and submits to his immediate supervisor. Co-ordinates with finance and ensures that payments are affected in time.
	Ensures that rejected materials are returned to vendor for credit or replacement. Periodically reviews open POS to ensure timely receipt and closure of the orders.
	Evaluates vendors' Invoices & processes Change Notices for every repair order (R/O). Establish future requirements based on the historical compiled data.
	Pursues warranty claims for materials that fail to provide service at the initial acquisition. Reviews and negotiates on
	purchase/repair cost estimates before getting approval.
	Expedites orders in coordination with vendors, logistics, freight forwarders and clearing agents. Co-ordinates with Stores, Logistics and maintenance planning regarding parts requirements and ensures availability of required parts for all aircraft undergoing major maintenance.
	Administers warranty service agreements and ensures APL gets the maximum out of it. Keeps records of vendors' performance & provides reports when required.
	Prepares and reviews the monthly activities and submits to his immediate supervisor upon request


Requirements


	BSc / BA Degree in Supply Chain / Contract Management / Engineering
	Strategic Sourcing and Category Management
	Good negotiation prowels
	Supplier Relationship Management.
	Risk Management
	Cost Management
	Analytical Skills
	Contract Management
	Technical Proficiency
	Communication Skills
	Ethical and Sustainable Sourcing


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

2.) Embrear E2 Aircraft Engineer

Job Location: Lagos
Job Type: Full-time

Role Description


	To carry out assigned repair and replacement tasks on aircraft and aircraft systems in accordance with regulatory and company procedures to uphold high safety standards and schedule integrity.


Key Responsibilities


	Assign and carry out inspections, repair, replacement and modification tasks on aircraft, aircraft components and aircraft systems.
	Daily planning of own tasks, allocate tasks to the team of Technicians.
	 Assess defects on aircraft, rectify and Certify within the limitation of company approval in accordance with standard operating procedures.
	 Perform certification of tasks accomplished by the team of technicians.
	 Communicate with internal/external customers to give and receive information on assigned duties, progress status.
	 Make decision on resources allocation and team tasks in line with standard operating procedures.
	Ensure tasks are performed to meet company standards and targets.
	 Review work procedures and standards and propose improvements to procedures to ensure effectiveness.
	Identify and requisition of the required aircraft parts.
	Report incidents / accident occurrences as per company procedures
	Ensure that maintenance tasks are recorded accurately & signed for to maintain correct & up to date aircraft history /data.
	Adhere to the company safety, health, and environmental policy.
	Supervise and Develop technicians for improved competency/ efficiency.


Key Performance Indicators


	90% Aircraft Availability
	Quality of Maintenance
	Number of incidents / accidents
	Quality audit findings
	Optimal material and resource usage
	Develop and Mentor technicians on the fleet.


Requirements


	Diploma in the relevant Engineering discipline (Mechanical / Electrical /Aeronautical / Instrumentation)
	At least 6 years of aircraft maintenance certifying experience. Type-rated on Embraer 195 E2 or Embraer 170/190 E1 series;holding both ratings will be an added advantage.
	Additional aircraft approvals (e.g., borescope inspection, engine run) will be an advantage. Good knowledge of aircraft systems
	Good Knowledge of Aviation Legislation/Regulations
	Proficiency in computer applications and MRO systems
	Ability to interpret technical data.
	Good inspection and troubleshooting technique.
	Supervisory skills
	Good Knowledge of Industrial Safety Standards
	Human factors knowledge


Competencies:


	Have proven integrity, transparency, and accountability.
	Ability to handle multiple tasks without compromising quality.
	Leadership
	Strong interpersonal communication skills
	Analytical Thinking
	Customer service orientation


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

3.) Embrear E2 Aircraft Engineer

Job Location: Lagos
Job Type: Full-time

Role Description


	To carry out assigned repair and replacement tasks on aircraft and aircraft systems in accordance with regulatory and company procedures to uphold high safety standards and schedule integrity.


Key Responsibilities


	Assign and carry out inspections, repair, replacement and modification tasks on aircraft, aircraft components and aircraft systems.
	Daily planning of own tasks, allocate tasks to the team of Technicians.
	 Assess defects on aircraft, rectify and Certify within the limitation of company approval in accordance with standard operating procedures.
	 Perform certification of tasks accomplished by the team of technicians.
	 Communicate with internal/external customers to give and receive information on assigned duties, progress status.
	 Make decision on resources allocation and team tasks in line with standard operating procedures.
	Ensure tasks are performed to meet company standards and targets.
	 Review work procedures and standards and propose improvements to procedures to ensure effectiveness.
	Identify and requisition of the required aircraft parts.
	Report incidents / accident occurrences as per company procedures
	Ensure that maintenance tasks are recorded accurately & signed for to maintain correct & up to date aircraft history /data.
	Adhere to the company safety, health, and environmental policy.
	Supervise and Develop technicians for improved competency/ efficiency.


Key Performance Indicators


	90% Aircraft Availability
	Quality of Maintenance
	Number of incidents / accidents
	Quality audit findings
	Optimal material and resource usage
	Develop and Mentor technicians on the fleet.


Requirements


	Diploma in the relevant Engineering discipline (Mechanical / Electrical /Aeronautical / Instrumentation)
	At least 6 years of aircraft maintenance certifying experience. Type-rated on Embraer 195 E2 or Embraer 170/190 E1 series;holding both ratings will be an added advantage.
	Additional aircraft approvals (e.g., borescope inspection, engine run) will be an advantage. Good knowledge of aircraft systems
	Good Knowledge of Aviation Legislation/Regulations
	Proficiency in computer applications and MRO systems
	Ability to interpret technical data.
	Good inspection and troubleshooting technique.
	Supervisory skills
	Good Knowledge of Industrial Safety Standards
	Human factors knowledge


Competencies:


	Have proven integrity, transparency, and accountability.
	Ability to handle multiple tasks without compromising quality.
	Leadership
	Strong interpersonal communication skills
	Analytical Thinking
	Customer service orientation


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Relationship Facility Manager (Premium Event Centre)",
  "description": "IFS is an International Facilities Management company&nbsp;operating global standards to a wide range of clients in Nigeria, Ghana, South Africa and the Middle East.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Relationship Facility Manager&nbsp;(Premium Event Centre)

Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	This is not a routine operations role.
	This is for a commercially sharp operator who understands that every client interaction is an opportunity to drive revenue, strengthen relationships, and elevate experience.
	We are hiring a Customer Relationship Facility Manager to take full ownership of a high-end event centre, ensuring flawless execution while actively growing wallet share per client.


What You Will Own


	Be the face of the business on-site &mdash; managing high-value client relationships end-to-end.
	Deliver a flawless, premium experience across every event.
	Spot and close upsell and cross-sell opportunities (before, during, and after events).
	Drive repeat business and client retention.
	Oversee facility readiness &mdash; ambience, cleanliness, functionality must be non-negotiable.
	Act fast on issues &mdash; no excuses, only solutions.


Why This Role Matters


	This role directly impacts client satisfaction, brand perception, and revenue growth.
	If you perform, you will be visible, valued, and rewarded.


Core Responsibilities
Customer Relationship Management:


	Serve as the primary point of contact for all client interactions on-site.
	Ensure consistent, high-quality customer experience aligned with IFS standards.
	Capture client needs and translate them into actionable service delivery plans.
	Manage feedback loops and ensure timely resolution of issues.
	Be the brand ambassador for IFS positioning us as preferred provider to client and every patron of the centre.


Facility Management &amp; Service Delivery:


	Oversee day-to-day facility operations, ensuring readiness at all times.
	Enforce IFS quality standards across cleaning, maintenance, and ambience.
	Conduct routine inspections and compliance checks.
	Coordinate vendors and internal teams to ensure seamless execution.


Revenue Optimization:


	Identify opportunities for cross-selling and upselling of IFS services.
	Support conversion of client needs into billable services.
	Drive client retention and lifetime value growth.
	Maintain visibility on revenue opportunities and performance metrics.


Reporting &amp; Continuous Improvement:


	Maintain structured records of operations, client interactions, and revenue activities.
	Provide periodic reports on KPIs: service quality, client satisfaction, and revenue growth.
	Support implementation of process improvements and standardization initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in a relevant discipline.
	3&ndash;5 years of experience in facility management, hospitality, or client-facing roles.
	Strong understanding of service delivery systems and client management.
	Demonstrated ability to support revenue growth initiatives.
	Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.


What We Expect:


	You think like a revenue owner, not just an operator.
	You are confident dealing with high-profile, high-expectation clients.
	You can sell without sounding like you&rsquo;re selling.
	You have strong instincts for quality, detail, and presentation.
	You take full ownership &mdash; if it happens on-site, it&rsquo;s on you


Your Background:


	3&ndash;5+ years in hospitality, events, facility management, or client service roles.
	Proven ability to upsell, cross-sell, or grow accounts.
	Strong presence, communication, and problem-solving ability.
",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-11",

Customer Relationship Facility Manager (Premium Event Centre) Job at IFS Group




        
    

        
        IFS is an International Facilities Management company operating global standards to a wide range of clients in Nigeria, Ghana, South Africa and the Middle East.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Relationship Facility Manager (Premium Event Centre)

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	This is not a routine operations role.
	This is for a commercially sharp operator who understands that every client interaction is an opportunity to drive revenue, strengthen relationships, and elevate experience.
	We are hiring a Customer Relationship Facility Manager to take full ownership of a high-end event centre, ensuring flawless execution while actively growing wallet share per client.


What You Will Own


	Be the face of the business on-site — managing high-value client relationships end-to-end.
	Deliver a flawless, premium experience across every event.
	Spot and close upsell and cross-sell opportunities (before, during, and after events).
	Drive repeat business and client retention.
	Oversee facility readiness — ambience, cleanliness, functionality must be non-negotiable.
	Act fast on issues — no excuses, only solutions.


Why This Role Matters


	This role directly impacts client satisfaction, brand perception, and revenue growth.
	If you perform, you will be visible, valued, and rewarded.


Core Responsibilities
Customer Relationship Management:


	Serve as the primary point of contact for all client interactions on-site.
	Ensure consistent, high-quality customer experience aligned with IFS standards.
	Capture client needs and translate them into actionable service delivery plans.
	Manage feedback loops and ensure timely resolution of issues.
	Be the brand ambassador for IFS positioning us as preferred provider to client and every patron of the centre.


Facility Management & Service Delivery:


	Oversee day-to-day facility operations, ensuring readiness at all times.
	Enforce IFS quality standards across cleaning, maintenance, and ambience.
	Conduct routine inspections and compliance checks.
	Coordinate vendors and internal teams to ensure seamless execution.


Revenue Optimization:


	Identify opportunities for cross-selling and upselling of IFS services.
	Support conversion of client needs into billable services.
	Drive client retention and lifetime value growth.
	Maintain visibility on revenue opportunities and performance metrics.


Reporting & Continuous Improvement:


	Maintain structured records of operations, client interactions, and revenue activities.
	Provide periodic reports on KPIs: service quality, client satisfaction, and revenue growth.
	Support implementation of process improvements and standardization initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in a relevant discipline.
	3–5 years of experience in facility management, hospitality, or client-facing roles.
	Strong understanding of service delivery systems and client management.
	Demonstrated ability to support revenue growth initiatives.
	Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.


What We Expect:


	You think like a revenue owner, not just an operator.
	You are confident dealing with high-profile, high-expectation clients.
	You can sell without sounding like you’re selling.
	You have strong instincts for quality, detail, and presentation.
	You take full ownership — if it happens on-site, it’s on you


Your Background:


	3–5+ years in hospitality, events, facility management, or client service roles.
	Proven ability to upsell, cross-sell, or grow accounts.
	Strong presence, communication, and problem-solving ability.
